subcodes.first_line: O beloved friend and kindly companion, though mine eyes are deprived of beholding the faces of the friends and am bereft of their presence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار عزیز و همدم مهربان من هر چند بدیده از مشاهده روی یاران محروم و مهجور
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart
